chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-339 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.2716/2019 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders o M.A No.2717/2019 4. For hearing of main case 29.03.2019. Mr. Shahnawaz Brohi advocate a/w applicant *** 1. Urgency accorded. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is inter-alia contended that applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in present crime bearing FIR No.140/2018 registered u/s 302, 337AD, 34 PPC at PS Shalkot District Quetta; that applicant wants to surrender before the trial court for seeking his remedy in accordance with law but apprehends his arrest on his way to Quetta and before reaching trial court, therefore, needs protection. Learned counsel has relied upon the case law reported in 1990 MLD 1522 and 1989 P Cr. L.J 2152 to establish that this court has jurisdiction to grant protective bail even though the case is registered in another province. Without touching merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail for eight days subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and PR Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of eight days i.e. on 05.04.2019 or on surrender of applicant before trial court, whichever is earlier. This application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
